ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF 560 SUTTER, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 560 SUTTER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNAPPEN, MOLLY DBA THINK STUDIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 560 SUTTER STREET, STE. 220, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ORIGINAL LEASE STAMPED: JUDGMENT RENDERED ON.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 560 SUTTER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNAPPEN, MOLLY DBA THINK STUDIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF NOV. 24, 2003. $2,566.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,566.60, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 560 SUTTER, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPPEN, MOLLY DBA THINK STUDIO DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
